template_data.headline_html: Four beliefs that cost businesses their federal window.

items.title: "No federal contracts yet"
items.desc: You don't need them. Two years in business and commercial revenue is what GSA requires.

items.title: "GSA is only for IT"
items.desc: The MAS covers 30+ categories — construction, consulting, health, logistics, and more.

items.title: "The process takes years"
items.desc: It takes 6–12 months. Our team handles the 100+ paperwork hours; you provide about three.

items.title: "Contracts come automatically"
items.desc: The Schedule opens the door. Your pipeline and follow-through walk through it.

image_headline: FOUR MYTHS BLOCKING YOUR GSA START
image_prompt: Infographic numbered list layout. Cream background. Bold dark-navy headline at top: 'FOUR MYTHS BLOCKING YOUR GSA START'. Left column: illustrated professional man in a blazer, arms slightly open as if explaining something on a call, expression warm and engaged. Right side: four numbered rows in dark-navy blocks — '01 NO PAST CONTRACTS', '02 ONLY FOR IT', '03 TAKES YEARS', '04 CONTRACTS AUTO' — each with a small amber circle icon on the left. Bottom dark-navy banner with short label 'HEAR THESE DAILY'. Footer text: 'William Hill · GSA Focus'.
